zh.Orton Longueville, Huntingdonshire, Engl: 英國亨廷格多史爾奧爾頓 隆維爾
英國英格蘭亨廷格多史爾奧爾頓 隆維爾
zh.lifeSummary: Henry I de Longeville於大約1100年出生在英國亨廷格多史爾奧爾頓 隆維爾。他與Mrs Henry de Longeville在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1145年在他的家鄉享年47歲。

英国英格兰亨廷格多史爾奧爾頓 隆維爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Henry I de Longeville于大约1100年出生在英国亨廷格多史爾奧爾頓 隆維爾。他与Mrs Henry de Longeville在英国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于大约1145年在他的家乡享年47岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Longeville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Longueville-la-Gifart, now Longueville-sur-Scie (Seine-Maritime, France).

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: Henry I de Longeville was born about 1100, in Orton Longueville, Huntingdonshire, England. He married Mrs Henry de Longeville in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died about 1145, in his hometown, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Henry I de Longeville est né environ 1100, à Orton Longueville, Huntingdonshire, Angleterre. Il a épousé Mrs Henry de Longeville à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé environ 1145, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 47 ans.

ja.Orton Longueville, Huntingdonshire, Engl: イギリスハンティングドンシュアイアオルトン ロングエヴィル
イギリスイギリスハンティングドンシュアイアオルトン ロングエヴィル
ja.lifeSummary: Henry I de Longevilleは約1100年にイギリスハンティングドンシュアイアオルトン ロングエヴィルで生まれた。イギリスでMrs Henry de Longevilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は約1145年に故郷で47歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry I de Longeville(은)는 대략 1100년 영국 헌틴그도실르 오턴 론구에빌에서 태어났다. 그는 영국에서 Mrs Henry de Longeville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1145년 그의 고향에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Henry I de Longeville родился около 1100 г. в местности ортон лонгуевилл, хантингдоншир, Англия. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs Henry de Longeville в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер около 1145 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 47 лет.
